mapper.insert:
insert into class
major_id, class_name, head_teacher_id, status
values
#{majorId}, #{className}, #{headTeacherId}, '在读'
mapper.update:
update class
class_name = #{className},
head_teacher_id = #{headTeacherId},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select c.id, m.id as major_id, m.major_name, c.class_name, c.head_teacher_id, t.name as head_teacher_name, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time from class c left join major m on c.major_id = m.id left join teacher t on c.head_teacher_id = t.id where c.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE class_id = #{id}
select s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, s.status from student s where s.class_id = #{classId} order by s.student_no

select distinct c.id, m.id as major_id, m.major_name, c.class_name, c.head_teacher_id, t.name as head_teacher_name, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time from course_schedule cs join course_schedule_class csc on csc.schedule_id = cs.id join class c on csc.class_id = c.id left join major m on c.major_id = m.id left join teacher t on c.head_teacher_id = t.id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and cs.semester_id = #{semesterId} order by c.class_name
